mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO CMS_MENU_LOG ( work_type, work_date, member_id, work_ip, homepage_id, menu_idx, group_idx, menu_name, parent_menu_idx, menu_url, menu_type, html, link_url ) VALUES ( #{work_type}, SYSDATE, #{member_id}, #{work_ip}, #{homepage_id}, #{menu_idx},
NVL((SELECT group_idx FROM CMS_MENU where homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND menu_idx = #{parent_menu_idx}), 0), NVL((SELECT menu_name FROM CMS_MENU where homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND menu_idx = #{menu_idx}), ''),
#{group_idx}, #{menu_name},
#{parent_menu_idx}, #{menu_url}, #{menu_type}, #{html}, #{link_url} )
